title: Insurance Underwriter
description: Join CBRE's underwriting team to evaluate and manage insurance risk. You'll review applications and make underwriting decisions on commercial properties and liabilities.
responsibilities: Review insurance applications and supporting documentation
Evaluate risk factors and financial metrics for commercial accounts
Make underwriting decisions on coverage and pricing
Communicate with brokers and clients regarding coverage decisions
Stay current with underwriting guidelines and regulatory requirements

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
